data.title: Everstage introduces Agent Core for Sales Performance Management, unifying AI agents for ICM. Shifts to real-time optimization.
data.description: Everstage, a top player in AI-based Sales Performance Management (SPM), has introduced Everstage Agent Core in New York. This new agentic intelligence layer revolutionizes SPM by offering automation, transparency, and proactive decision-making. The Agent Core integrates intelligence throughout its platform, allowing businesses to move from reactive processes to real-time, AI-driven optimization. The launch includes four AI agents specifically concentrating on Incentive Compensation Management (ICM).

data.title: Charles Ingram named EVP & Chief Info & Ops Officer at Pathward.
data.description: In Phoenix, Charles Ingram has recently been named the Executive Vice President and Chief Information and Operations Officer for Pathward.
Spendesk named top in IDC MarketScape for AI travel & expense apps for small business and midmarket. #leadership #recognition

data.title: VIVOLTA partners with Fibrothelium to manufacture SimplySilk® membrane for oral surgery, enhancing guided bone regeneration.
data.description: A Netherlands-based company, VIVOLTA, has collaborated with Fibrothelium to produce SimplySilk® membrane, a specialized silk membrane designed to facilitate guided bone regeneration in oral surgery procedures. This partnership aims to enhance the manufacturing and distribution of the product to meet the growing demand in the medical industry.

data.title: Roblox introduces Sentinel, an AI system to detect child endangerment, open source for use on other platforms.Character count: 106
data.description: In San Mateo, California, Roblox Corporation (NYSE: RBLX) has introduced Roblox Sentinel, an AI system aimed at identifying child endangerment messages swiftly. The platform will now be able to address potential issues sooner and notify law enforcement when necessary. Sentinel is accessible to other digital platforms for implementation, serving as a preventive measure. This move is part of Roblox's commitment to safety and highlights the significance of early detection in protecting children.

data.title: Astound builds WiFi network reaching 40k homes, 5k businesses in rural WA and OR, expanding by end of year.
data.description: Astound, a prominent provider of internet, Wi-Fi, mobile, TV, and fiber-optic services, has unveiled a significant plan to extend high-speed internet availability to over 40,000 households and 5,000 businesses in mainly rural regions of western Washington and Oregon by the conclusion of this year. By August 5th, the initiative had already reached 29,000 homes in areas like Longview, Kelso, Castle Rock, Oak Harbor, and Camano Island in Washington, along with communities in Columbia County, Oregon.

data.title: Credit Sesame partners with Green Dot's Arc platform to improve digital banking through Sesame Cash account in Provo, Utah.
data.description: In Provo, Utah a digital bank account named Sesame Cash has been launched on Green Dot’s embedded finance platform, Arc. This innovative account is designed to empower users to manage their finances effectively and plan for the future. Powered by Green Dot, Sesame Cash aims to provide individuals with the tools they need to take control of their money.

data.title: Adversa AI wins Gold Stevie Award for AI breakthrough in technology excellence. Recognition in Tel Aviv on August 7, 2025.
data.description: The Gold Stevie Awards for Technology Excellence have recognized outstanding accomplishments in technology by individuals, teams, and organizations across various industry sectors. Adversa AI, based in TEL AVIV, Israel, was named the sole recipient of a Gold Stevie Award on August 7, 2025.

data.title: Cali Bank, N.A. partners with FinTech Automation for digital transformation using UniFi system. Impacts on infrastructure.
data.description: In August 7, 2025, it was announced that Cali Bank, N.A. has teamed up with FinTech Automation (FTA) to update its banking framework by implementing the UniFi core banking system. This partnership plays a key role in Cali Bank, N.A.'s efforts toward digital transformation, allowing the bank to streamline its processes through automation.

data.title: Thoughtworks offers curated list from its technology podcasts for summer binge listening in Chicago.
data.description: A technology consultancy firm, Thoughtworks, based in Chicago, is providing a selection of Technology Podcasts featuring design, engineering, and AI.
Spot Gold Slightly Rises After US Economic Data, Last Up 0.5% at $3,385.19 per Ounce

data.title: CARFAX Car Care app reaches 50M users, sends reminders to 1 in 4 car owners in the US. Major milestone achieved.
data.description: The CARFAX Car Care app is currently sending timely reminders to over 12.5 million car owners in the United States, marking a significant achievement for the company. This milestone comes as the app continues to grow in popularity, with more than 50 million car owners using it to manage their vehicle maintenance and schedules. The app, provided for free by CARFAX, operates as a tool to assist car owners in staying organized and up-to-date with their car care needs, helping them to ensure the proper maintenance of their vehicles. The success of the app demonstrates its value to a large portion of the car-owning population in the U.S., highlighting its effectiveness in helping users track and manage their automotive responsibilities.

data.title: United Homes Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: UHG) reports $6.3 million net loss in 2025 Q2, $6.2 million from fair value changes.
data.description: COLUMBIA, S.C.--United Homes Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: UHG) revealed its financial outcomes for the periods ending June 30, 2025. In the second quarter of 2025, the Company reported a net loss of $6.3 million, equivalent to $0.11 per diluted share. This loss encompassed a $6.2 million loss from the modification in fair value of derivative liabilities, primarily influenced by shifts in the fair value related to potential earn-out consideration, affected by market fluctuations.

data.title: Massimo Group partners with Vietnam for manufacturing, golf cart deliveries to U.S soon. (Words: 70)
data.description: An announcement was made by Massimo Group (NASDAQ: MAMO) that they will start receiving their new six-seater golf carts at their manufacturing facility in Garland, Texas. The company is known for producing golf carts and is expanding its product line to include the feature-rich six-seater option. This development signifies a significant step for Massimo Group as they enhance their offerings to accommodate a larger number of users.

data.title: Flagstar Bank expands in South Florida with a new private client office in Palm Beach, deepening commitment to affluent clients.
data.description: Flagstar Bank, N.A., a subsidiary of Flagstar Financial, Inc. (NYSE: FLG), has amplified its dedication to relationship-focused private banking in the rapidly expanding market for prosperous clients. The Bank, headquartered in Hicksville, N.Y., disclosed today the initiation of its expanded efforts to cater to affluent customers, aiming to capitalize on the high-growth market.

data.title: Runway Growth Capital grants $20M loan to Swing Education for expansion in nationwide substitute teacher service demand.
data.description: A recent announcement reveals that Swing Education will receive funding to aid in their expansion across the nation and to meet the increasing need for skilled substitute teachers. The funding comes from Runway Growth Capital LLC, a prominent provider of growth loans to both venture and non-venture-backed companies. This development was disclosed on August 7, 2025, and signifies a significant investment to support Swing Education's growth as they continue to cater to the rising demand.

data.title: Mathematica introduces PricePrism platform, offering healthcare organizations tools to enhance competitiveness.
data.description: A cutting-edge collection of resources, analysis, and data insights is now available to aid healthcare and medical entities in gaining a competitive edge and pinpointing key growth prospects. This development was announced in Princeton, New Jersey on August 7, 2025. Mathematica, a prominent data analytics and research firm, is at the forefront of this initiative, offering essential tools and information to help organizations thrive in the industry.

data.title: Spinogenix reports positive Phase 2a trial results for SPG302 for Alzheimer's, improving cognitive measures. #Spinogenix #Alzheimers
data.description: Spinogenix, Inc., based in Los Angeles, California, has developed SPG302, a promising first-in-class synaptic regenerative therapy. The therapy has demonstrated advancements in cognitive outcome measures and has shown a positive safety profile. This news was announced on August 7, 2025. SPG302 marks a significant development in the field of biopharmaceuticals, highlighting its potential to address cognitive impairments. Its success in clinical trials signifies a breakthrough that could benefit numerous individuals.

data.title: Sidus Space to discuss Q2 financial results on Aug 14 at 5:00 p.m. ET, call +1-877-269-7751 for U.S. toll-free access.
data.description: Sidus Space, a leading space and defense technology provider listed on NASDAQ as SIDU, revealed plans to conduct its Q2 2025 financial results conference call on Thursday, August 14, starting at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. The conference call will be accessible via phone at +1-877-269-7751 for U.S. Toll-Free callers, or +1-201-389-0908 for international participants. This event provides stakeholders an opportunity to gain insights into the company's financial performance during the stated quarter.

data.title: Archer (NYSE: ACHR) accelerates defense program with two acquisitions, raising $1.3B for development of next-gen aircraft.
data.description: Archer (NYSE: ACHR) based in Huntington Beach, California, has revealed two key acquisitions aimed at expediting the advancement of its cutting-edge defense aircraft. These acquisitions expand on Archer's earlier partnership with Anduril in December 2024 to collaborate on hybrid, autonomous VTOL military aircraft development. The company also successfully secured $1.3 billion in funding to pursue opportunities in the defense and commercial sectors. The move follows rising interest from major stakeholders in Archer's innovative projects.
